sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 11:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 11:1
items.html: GAR of Nekudim receive from the first three corrections of Dikna in their gathering place, called Shibolet HaZakan. This is because the three corrections of Dikna in their place in the Rosh are the phase of the first Rosh of the Dikna. (Inner Light, Item 20)
